component.name: Copyworks
component.summary: Chinese character worksheet generator for families

description.p: Copyworks helps families create custom Chinese character practice worksheets. Enter any Chinese text — children's names, poems, idioms, or vocabulary from any curriculum — and generate beautiful, printable copysheets with guide grids, pinyin, stroke order, and more.

ul.li: Multiple grid types: Tian zi ge, Mi zi ge, Hui gong ge
Annotations: pinyin with tone marks, bopomofo/zhuyin, English definitions
Tone colors for visual learning (characters colored by tone)
Flash card generation with grid guides
Built-in content library: HSK, YCT, TOCFL, Tang poems, idioms, names
PDF export for printing on A4 or US Letter paper

screenshot.caption: Chinese character copysheet with Mi zi ge grid and tone colors

description.p: Live FastSpring checkout, CI updates, version bump.
